Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3307-06-10
Core Dynamics Triumphs Against Jupiter Division
Jupiter Division is defeated by the Silver Legal Group in the Ts'ao Tach system. The breakaway faction will be subsumed by Core Enterprises, a Core Dynamics subsidiary. CEO Owen McKenna declares Rochester's 'delusions' ended, while newsfeeds predict negative impact on the corporatist movement.
3307-06-03
Core Dynamics Engages Jupiter Division in Battle
Core Dynamics and its ally the Silver Legal Group battle Jupiter Division in the Ts'ao Tach system. CEO Owen McKenna vows to wipe out Rochester's 'deranged cult' while Jupiter Division VP Blanca Carbonell calls for supporters to defend corporate rule.
